2026-04-10T21:15:19.4979107Z   
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4979575Z   **Library name and version:** `Azure.ResourceManager.Sql - 1.4.0`
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4980175Z   
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4980487Z   **Describe the bug:**
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4981119Z   - `1.4.0-beta.3` required `Azure.Core >= 1.47.1` and `Azure.ResourceManager >= 1.13.2`
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4982014Z   - `1.4.0 GA` requires `Azure.Core >= 1.52.0` and `Azure.ResourceManager >= 1.14.0`
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4983202Z   - This is a large dependency jump. Apps built against beta.3 **build successfully** after upgrading to GA but **fail at runtime** with:
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4984211Z   
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4984496Z   ```
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4986184Z   System.MissingMethodException: Method not found: 'Void System.Diagnostics.ActivitySource..ctor(System.String)'
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4987116Z     at Azure.Core.Pipeline.DiagnosticScopeFactory...
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4987772Z     at Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.ResourceGroupResource.<GetAsync>d__18.MoveNext()
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4988567Z   ```
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4988751Z   
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4989217Z   **Expected behavior:** GA release should have compatible or incrementally upgraded dependencies relative to the preceding beta.
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4989749Z   
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4990051Z   **Actual behavior:** Build succeeds, runtime fails with `MissingMethodException`.
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4990439Z   
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4990611Z   **Reproduction Steps:**
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4991165Z   1. Build against `Azure.ResourceManager.Sql 1.4.0-beta.3` with `Azure.Core 1.49.0` — confirm it works
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4991669Z   2. Upgrade to `1.4.0 GA` (forces `Azure.Core >= 1.52.0`)
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4992334Z   3. Build succeeds → Run → `MissingMethodException` at runtime
2026-04-10T21:15:19.4992664Z
